title: frangula sphaerocarpa
intro: Frangula sphaerocarpa, also known as the globe buckthorn, is a species of shrub or small tree in the buckthorn family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purgative properties, specifically to stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation due to its anthraquinone content. The medicinal properties of Frangula sphaerocarpa have been found to have potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving gut health, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Frangula sphaerocarpa is often prepared as a tea or decoction for its medicinal uses, and it can also be found in various herbal supplements and tinctures.
